-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade AS geometry FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Drammen%'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

1.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade AS geometry FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Drammen%';

2.sql: SELECT omrade AS geometry FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal WHERE gjentaksintervall = '200' AND ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_Transform((SELECT geometry FROM step_1 LIMIT 1), 25833));

1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year flood zones filtered by municipality extent

3.description: get quick-clay hazard zones filtered by municipality extent

6.description: calculate distance from each building to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance to quick-clay

8.description: sort buildings by distance to quick-clay ascending, then by building ID ascending
